CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
INSERT INTO TEST_XMLS VALUES (3, XMLType('<oil-rig xml:id="14a_06" water="0.413"/><oil-rig xml:id="14b_06" water="0.402"/>'));
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getStringVal() AS ENAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//poname').getStringVal() AS PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/pono');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getStringVal() AS EMPNO, e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getStringVal() AS ENAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp');
SELECT e1.XMLVAL.extract('//empno').getStringVal() AS EMPNO, e2.XMLVAL.extract('//poname').getStringVal() AS PONAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e1 JOIN TEST_XMLS AS e2 ON e1.I = 1 AND e2.I = 2;

SELECT (SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename').getStringVal() FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp')) AS ENAME, (SELECT e2.XMLVAL.extract('//poname').getStringVal() FROM TEST_XMLS AS e2 WHERE e2.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po')) AS PONAME;
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//oil-rig/@xml:id').getStringVal() AS OIL_RIG_ID FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/oil-rig');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename/first').getStringVal() AS FIRST_NAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/ename/first');
SELECT e.XMLVAL.extract('//ename/last').getStringVal() AS LAST_NAME FROM TEST_XMLS AS e WHERE e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/ename/last');
